label: exp1_colony_24
comment: Experiment 1 medium population: same non-trivial finite-food map as exp1_colony_12, but with 24 ants. This tests whether additional scouts and carriers improve the reliability and speed of food supply without changing the environment.
hypothesis: A medium colony should deliver more food and stabilize earlier than the 12-ant run because pheromone trails are discovered and reinforced more often.
